file_summary: This is the main entry point for a FastAPI application named 'DevBrain Backend'. It initializes the FastAPI app with a title and version, then includes three API routers for health checks, repository operations, and question-asking functionality.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the entire file. Lines 1-3 import FastAPI and three router modules from backend API submodules. Lines 5-6 initialize the FastAPI application with metadata. Lines 7-9 register all three routers to the app, making their endpoints available in the API.
